name: claude-agile
description: Agile methodology layer on top of ccpm. 12-role specialist team: Core (Scrum Master, Tech Lead, Developer, QA), Infra (Cloud Architect, DevOps, DBA, Observability), Security (Security Engineer, Pen Tester), Product (UX Designer, Data Engineer). Supports Scrum/Kanban/Shape Up/Lean-XP with onboarding wizard, role-based communication protocol, and task audit trails. Requires ccpm.
